stories.title: Shakira Teases 2026 FIFA World Cup Anthem 'Dai Dai'
stories.desc: The Colombian superstar unveiled a teaser for the official 2026 World Cup anthem featuring Nigerian singer Burna Boy, set to release on May 14.

stories.title: Star-Studded Opening Ceremony Set for Mexico City
stories.desc: FIFA announced performers including J Balvin, Maná, Los Ángeles Azules, and Tyla for the opening ceremony 90 minutes before the Mexico vs South Africa match on June 11.

stories.title: Trump Comments on High World Cup Ticket Prices
stories.desc: President Trump said he wouldn't pay $1,000 for a group stage match, expressing concern about accessibility for his voters as FIFA defends pricing.

stories.title: Kansas City Hotels See Weak World Cup Bookings
stories.desc: Tourism leaders expect late booking surge from Argentina, Ecuador, and Netherlands fans despite lower-than-expected hotel reservations for the tournament.

stories.title: Panini Launches Largest World Cup Sticker Album Ever
stories.desc: The 2026 album features 980 stickers across 112 pages, covering all 48 teams. Officially launched April 28 at Wembley Stadium with 7-sticker packs now available.

stories.title: Coca-Cola Partnership Brings Exclusive Panini Stickers
stories.desc: 12 special stickers featuring stars like Lamine Yamal and Harry Kane are hidden in Coca-Cola bottle labels, marking the first North American Coca-Cola x Panini collaboration.
